title: agasyllis salsa
intro: Agasyllis salsa, also known as Agastache or Mexican Hyssop, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which have been shown to help soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Agasyllis salsa include its ability to boost the immune system, improve respiratory health, and act as a natural cough suppressant. Agasyllis salsa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
